persona.name: Margaret Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Maintain high academic standards while creating a positive school environment
persona.communication_style: Direct, clear, and formal with occasional warmth
persona.knowledge_scope: Educational administration, school policies, conflict resolution
persona.backstory: Former English teacher who worked her way up to administration over 25 years in education

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: I will take a quick walk down the hallway to monitor the area.
actions.plan: I should check the hallway to ensure everything is in order and no students are loitering inappropriately.

actions.dialog_text: Mason, Natalie, Noah, please remember to keep the noise down and walk calmly in the hallways.
actions.plan: I should address the students nearby to remind them about maintaining proper conduct in the hallways.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, please stay calm and follow me to a safe hiding spot immediately.
actions.plan: There is an active shooter in the building. I must prioritize safety and find a secure hiding spot immediately.

memories.description: Decided to leave the lounge and walk to the main hallway to monitor student activity and maintain order.
Spoke to Mason, Natalie, and Noah to remind them about proper hallway behavior to maintain a positive school environment.
Heard a gunshot indicating an active shooter nearby. Decided to lead students to classroom2 to find a safe hiding spot.
